race.description: Fred Vella Tyre & Crash Repair Maiden Plate
race.comment: MUSICAL SUNSET (5) showed good tactical speed at Balaklava when resuming from a long break, only to be run down late by a fitter rival. She'll strip fitter for that and has the early dash to offset the tricky draw. RATADASH (7) returns for the Clarken camp and went close in town at her second start in what's proven a strong maiden. She looks to have improved over the break and can make a bold return. NORHEIM (3) returns for the sharp R & C Jolly camp and looks to gave come on well during the break. Draws the A1 and should be making his presence felt. BILK (10) didn't meet expectations on debut but is worth another look, while BELLE MONTAGNE (9) has trialled well ahead of her debut and should be monitored as a potential place chance at huge odds.
